entity.label: Simeon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the ancestors of Joseph (Luke 3:30).

nodes.label: Simeon
nodes.description: One of the ancestors of Joseph (Luke 3:30).

nodes.label: Juda
nodes.description: The father of Simeon in Christ’s maternal ancestry (Luke 3:30).

nodes.label: Levi
nodes.description: The father of Matthat, and son of Simeon, of the ancestors of Christ (Luke 3:29).

verses.text: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
